name: Crescent City Junior/Senior High
description: Come play pickleball at Crescent City Junior/Senior High in Crescent City, FL! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.
